title: 10 best herbal teas for morning sickness
description: Foeniculum vulgare, also known as fennel, teas helps with morning sickness because of its unique combination of compounds. The tea contains anethole, a natural oil that has been shown to have anti-inflammatory properties and ease digestive discomfort. It also helps to stimulate digestion and relieve nausea, making it a popular remedy for pregnant women experiencing morning sickness.
